strap: London Creative Media Fashion draws £347m of UKRI lead-led funding across 894 grants, anchored by University College London (12%), Goldsmiths, University Of London (7%), with Disguise Technologies on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Coordinating instead of deciding" and "Forgiving instead of redesigning" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
